summary: Badly balanced soundboard recording with vocals drowning out the instruments, rendering it essentially unlistenable.
review: Both reviewers condemn this SBD as severely mis‑mixed, noting that the vocal level overwhelms the band and makes the tape virtually impossible to enjoy. No musical highlights are mentioned, indicating that the performance cannot be evaluated due to the poor audio quality.

ai_rating.rationale: Both reviewers gave a rating of zero and described the recording as unlistenable; with no positive comments on the show, the overall assessment is extremely low.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Vocals overpower all instruments; balance is badly off, resulting in a muffled and unlistenable mix.

show_quality.setlist_flow: No performance details provided in the reviews.
